name: 160 Pcs Fidget Toys Party Favors Pack, Randomly Selected Pop Sensory Set Gifts Stickers for Kids Adults Boy Girl Stocking Stuffers Autistic Bulk Goodie Bag Filler Treasure Box Classroom Prizes School
bullets: Set of 160 randomly selected items: 5 Squishies, 5 Sticky Hands, 5 Wobblers, 3 Pull back Animal Cars, 5 Mini Pop Keychains, 5 Spinners, 4 Pop Bracelets, 10 Slap Bracelets, 5 Airplane Pull Back Cars, 3 Plastic Walking Beads Cartoon Animal Maze, 5 Fingerboard, 3 Pop Keychain, 65 Assorted Stickers, 7 Monkey Noodles, 2 Stretchies, 5 Spike Balls, 6 mini dinosaur figures, 13 plastic rings, 2 Sensory Rings, 2 Pull back Race Cars — a perfect all-in-one surprise pack!
【POPULAR USES】Ideal for exciting Birthday Party Favors, Classroom Rewards, Carnivals, Piñata Fillers, Stocking Stuffers, and Goodie Bag treats.

【SUPERIOR QUALITY & CHILD SAFETY】Non-toxic. CPC Children Safety Certificate, ASTM F963-16/17 and CPSIA standards. Environmental friendly and Non-Radioactive. Safety-tested for durability and superior quality. Deluxe set for worry-free playtime.
You deserve the best, and that's why we offer a 2-year warranty.

reviews.name: Amanda
reviews.title: Great for potty rewards
reviews.body: This is a fantastic mix of little toys. I use them for potty rewards and my son loves them. There's plenty of variety. They're cheap enough where it doesn't matter that he's picking multiple a day. He went from using the potty once a day to staying dry all day! He particularly loves the skateboards and little wind up cars. The quality is mixed across products. Some I'd say are cheap and others…

reviews.name: collars world
reviews.title: Great Variety and Excellent Value
reviews.body: This pack was a huge hit! It includes a great variety of fidget toys, pop-its, stickers, and sensory items that kept kids entertained for hours. The assortment was colorful, fun, and offered something for everyone. Everything arrived as described, and the quantity makes it a great value for parties, classroom rewards, prize boxes, or giveaways. I would definitely purchase this set again.

reviews.name: C51
reviews.title: Great for Cats!
reviews.body: Remember when you were a kid getting all these items at birthday parties this was perfect. I actually got it for my cat. Some of the things he couldn’t have obviously but he loves playing with the skateboards and the plastic balls and everything that is safe and knock them all over them living room floor. Especially the snap Bracelets those are cool. You can lay them down in your cat jumps. It’s…

reviews.name: Stefanie McFarland
reviews.title: Great product
reviews.body: These are great for my treasure box!
